rationale: The citing paper is a tutorial review that explicitly includes pricing-policy applications such as “lowest-price guarantees” and relies on prior experiments/theory to illustrate behavioral mechanisms. Given this clear overlap (and exact DOI match in the reference list), this pair should be kept for full relation judgment rather than dropped as incidental mention.
